def build_urls(base_url, paths):
    urls = []
    for path in paths:
        url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/{path}"
        urls.append(url)
    return urls


def generate_log_messages(prefix, events):
    messages = []
    for event in events:
        msg = f"[{prefix}] Event: {event['name']} at {event['time']}"
        messages.append(msg)
    return messages


def create_headers(host, requests_list):
    headers = []
    for req in requests_list:
        header = f"Host: {host}\r\nContent-Type: application/json\r\nX-Request-ID: {req['id']}"
        headers.append(header)
    return headers
